controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (local area banks - interest rate on deposits) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks -
Interest Rate on Deposits) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (local area banks - interest rate on deposits) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect on the day it is placed on the official website of the reserve bank of india
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall come into effect on the day it is placed on the official
website of the Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect on the day it is placed on the official website of the reserve bank of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to local area banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Local Area Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to local area banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'alternative reference rate (arr)' means any widely accepted arr for the respective currency as prescrib
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Alternative Reference Rate (ARR)' means any widely accepted ARR for the
respective currency as prescribed in RBI circular on Roadmap for LIBOR Transition
issued vide CO.FMRD.DIRD.S39/14.02.001/2021-22 dated July 08, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'alternative reference rate (arr)' means any widely accepted arr for the respective currency as prescrib

controls.control_objective: To ensure single rupee term deposits of ₹1 crore and above
controls.control_description: (2) 'Bulk Deposit' means Single Rupee term deposits of ₹1 crore and above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to single rupee term deposits of ₹1 crore and above

controls.control_objective: To ensure a type of loan product having a cash credit limit with a fully savings module designed to take care of farmer's interest
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Composite Cash Credit' means a type of loan product having a cash credit limit
with a fully savings module designed to take care of farmer's interest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to a type of loan product having a cash credit limit with a fully savings module designed to take care of farmer's interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be deemed to include other deposit accounts which are neither savings deposit nor term deposit
controls.control_description:
(4) 'Current Account' means a form of non-interest bearing demand deposit where
from withdrawals are allowed any number of times depending upon the balance in
the account or up to a particular agreed amount and shall also be deemed to include
other deposit accounts which are neither Savings Deposit nor Term Deposit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be deemed to include other deposit accounts which are neither savings deposit nor term deposit

controls.control_objective: To ensure the interest applied on the end of day balance
controls.control_description:
<image>
(5) 'Daily Product' means the interest applied on the end of day balance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the interest applied on the end of day balance

controls.control_objective: To ensure a deposit received by a bank, which is withdrawable on demand
controls.control_description:
(6) 'Demand Deposit' means a deposit received by a bank, which is withdrawable on
demand.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a deposit received by a bank, which is withdrawable on demand

controls.control_objective: To ensure a foreign currency non-resident (bank) account referred to in foreign exchange management (deposit) regulations, 2016, as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
(9) 'FCNR(B) Account' means a Foreign Currency Non-Resident (Bank) account
referred to in Foreign Exchange Management (Deposit) Regulations, 2016, as
amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a foreign currency non-resident (bank) account referred to in foreign exchange management (deposit) regulations, 2016, as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure huf as defined under income-tax act, 1961
controls.control_description:
(10) 'Hindu Undivided Family' (HUF) means HUF as defined under Income-tax Act,
1961.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to huf as defined under income-tax act, 1961

controls.control_objective: To ensure a natural person
controls.control_description: (11) 'Individual' means a natural person.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a natural person

controls.control_objective: To ensure a person employed on a regular basis, whether full-time or part-time, and includes a person recruited on probation or employed on a contract for a spe
controls.control_description:
(12) 'Member of the bank's Staff' means a person employed on a regular basis,
whether full-time or part-time, and includes a person recruited on probation or
employed on a contract for a specified duration or on deputation and an employee
taken over in pursuance of any scheme of amalgamation but does not include a
person employed on casual basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a person employed on a regular basis, whether full-time or part-time, and includes a person recruited on probation or employed on a contract for a spe

controls.control_objective: To ensure term deposit for specific period but withdrawable on giving at least one complete banking day's notice
controls.control_description:
(13) 'Notice Deposit' means term deposit for specific period but withdrawable on
giving at least one complete banking day's notice.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to term deposit for specific period but withdrawable on giving at least one complete banking day's notice

controls.control_objective: To ensure a non-resident external deposit account referred to in foreign exchange management (deposit) regulations, 2016, as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
(14) 'NRE Account' means a Non-Resident External deposit account referred to in
Foreign Exchange Management (Deposit) Regulations, 2016, as amended from time
to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a non-resident external deposit account referred to in foreign exchange management (deposit) regulations, 2016, as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure a non-resident ordinary deposit account referred to in foreign exchange management (deposit) regulations, 2016, as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
(15) 'NRO Account' means a Non-Resident Ordinary deposit account referred to in
Foreign Exchange Management (Deposit) Regulations, 2016, as amended from time
to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a non-resident ordinary deposit account referred to in foreign exchange management (deposit) regulations, 2016, as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure an employee retiring whether on superannuation or otherwise as provided in the bank's service / staff regulations
controls.control_description:
(17) 'Retired Member of the bank's Staff' means an employee retiring whether on
superannuation or otherwise as provided in the bank's Service / Staff Regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an employee retiring whether on superannuation or otherwise as provided in the bank's service / staff regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure a resident foreign currency account referred to in foreign exchange management (foreign currency accounts by a person resident in india) regulations
controls.control_description:
<image>
(18) 'RFC Account' means a Resident Foreign Currency account referred to in
Foreign Exchange Management (Foreign currency accounts by a person resident in
India) Regulations, 2016, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a resident foreign currency account referred to in foreign exchange management (foreign currency accounts by a person resident in india) regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure also include deposits such as recurring / cumulative / annuity / reinvestment deposits and cash certificates
controls.control_description:
(20) 'Term Deposit' means an interest-bearing deposit received by a bank for a fixed
period and shall also include deposits such as Recurring / Cumulative / Annuity /
Reinvestment deposits and Cash Certificates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also include deposits such as recurring / cumulative / annuity / reinvestment deposits and cash certificates

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act,1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory modi
controls.control_description:
(21) All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act,1949 or the Reserve
Bank of India Act, 1934 or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as
used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act,1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory modi

controls.control_objective: To ensure pay interest on deposits (other than current account deposits) accepted or renewed by them in their domestic, non-resident ordinary (nro), non- reside
controls.control_description:
A bank shall pay interest on deposits (other than current account deposits)
accepted or renewed by them in their domestic, Non-Resident Ordinary (NRO), Non-
Resident (External) (NRE) and Foreign Currency (Non- Resident) Accounts (Banks)
Scheme {FCNR(B)} deposit account on the terms and conditions specified in these
directions:
(1) There shall be a comprehensive policy duly approved by the Board of Directors
or any Committee of the Board to which powers have been delegated in respect of:
Note: For limited purpose of paragraph 6(9), the meaning of 'bank' shall include
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pay interest on deposits (other than current account deposits) accepted or renewed by them in their domestic, non-resident ordinary (nro), non- reside

controls.control_objective: To ensure be uniform across all branches and for all customers and there shall be no discrimination in the matter of interest paid on the deposits, between one
controls.control_description:
(2) The interest rates offered on deposits shall be uniform across all branches and
for all customers and there shall be no discrimination in the matter of interest paid on
the deposits, between one deposit and another deposit of similar amount, accepted
on the same date, at any of its offices.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be uniform across all branches and for all customers and there shall be no discrimination in the matter of interest paid on the deposits, between one

controls.control_objective: To ensure be strictly as per the schedule of interest rates disclosed in advance
controls.control_description:
(3) Interest rates payable on deposits shall be strictly as per the schedule of interest
rates disclosed in advance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be strictly as per the schedule of interest rates disclosed in advance

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain the bulk deposit interest rate card in its core banking system to facilitate supervisory review
controls.control_description:
(4) A bank shall maintain the bulk deposit interest rate card in its Core Banking
System to facilitate supervisory review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain the bulk deposit interest rate card in its core banking system to facilitate supervisory review

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to negotiation between the depositors and the bank
controls.control_description:
(5) The rates shall not be subject to negotiation between the depositors and the
bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to negotiation between the depositors and the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reasonable, consistent, transparent, and available for supervisory review / scrutiny as and when required
controls.control_description:
(6) The interest rates offered shall be reasonable, consistent, transparent, and
available for supervisory review / scrutiny as and when required.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reasonable, consistent, transparent, and available for supervisory review / scrutiny as and when required

controls.control_objective: To ensure be rounded off to the nearest rupee for rupee deposits and to two decimal places for fcnr(b) deposits
controls.control_description:
(7) All transactions, involving payment of interest on deposits shall be rounded off to
the nearest rupee for rupee deposits and to two decimal places for FCNR(B)
deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be rounded off to the nearest rupee for rupee deposits and to two decimal places for fcnr(b) deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure pay interest at the originally contracted rate on the original principal deposit amount for the non-business working day, intervening between the date
controls.control_description:
(i) If a term deposit is maturing for payment on a non-business working day, a
<image>
bank shall pay interest at the originally contracted rate on the original principal
deposit amount for the non-business working day, intervening between the
date of the maturity of the specified term of the deposit and the date of
payment of the proceeds of the deposit on the succeeding working day.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pay interest at the originally contracted rate on the original principal deposit amount for the non-business working day, intervening between the date

controls.control_objective: To ensure pay interest for the intervening non-business working day on the maturity value
controls.control_description:
(ii) In case of reinvestment deposits and recurring deposits, a bank shall pay
interest for the intervening non-business working day on the maturity value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pay interest for the intervening non-business working day on the maturity value

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the following conditions:
controls.control_description:
(9) Consequence of transfer of branch of a bank to another bank
Deposit accounts transferred from one bank branch to another bank branch on
account of takeover of bank branches in rural and semi-urban centres shall adhere
to the following conditions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the following conditions:

controls.control_objective: To ensure deemed to be transferred to the new bank and will continue to be governed by the terms of contract agreed to between the customer and the bank branch
controls.control_description:
(i) deposit accounts shall deemed to be transferred to the new bank and will
continue to be governed by the terms of contract agreed to between the
customer and the bank branch that is being taken over.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deemed to be transferred to the new bank and will continue to be governed by the terms of contract agreed to between the customer and the bank branch

controls.control_objective: To ensure be payable till maturity on such transferred deposits, as was payable at the time of takeover of the branch
controls.control_description:
(ii) the same rate of interest shall be payable till maturity on such transferred
deposits, as was payable at the time of takeover of the branch.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be payable till maturity on such transferred deposits, as was payable at the time of takeover of the branch

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid on deposits held in current accounts
controls.control_description: No interest shall be paid on deposits held in current accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid on deposits held in current accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract interest from the date of death of the depositor till the date of repayment to the claimant(s) at the rate of interest applicable to savings d
controls.control_description:
Provided that balances lying in current account standing in the name of a deceased
individual depositor or sole proprietorship concern shall attract interest from the date
of death of the depositor till the date of repayment to the claimant(s) at the rate of
interest applicable to savings deposit as on the date of payment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract interest from the date of death of the depositor till the date of repayment to the claimant(s) at the rate of interest applicable to savings d

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following: (1) interest shall be calculated on a daily product basis as under:
controls.control_description:
In addition to the conditions laid down in paragraph 6 of these Directions, interest
on domestic rupee savings deposit shall be subject to the following:
(1) Interest shall be calculated on a daily product basis as under:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following: (1) interest shall be calculated on a daily product basis as under:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be set on balance up to ₹1 lakh, irrespective of the amount in the account within this limit
controls.control_description:
(i) A uniform interest rate shall be set on balance up to ₹1 lakh, irrespective of
the amount in the account within this limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be set on balance up to ₹1 lakh, irrespective of the amount in the account within this limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided for any end-of-day savings bank account balance exceeding ₹1 lakh
controls.control_description:
(ii) Differential rates of interest may be provided for any end-of-day savings bank
account balance exceeding ₹1 lakh.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided for any end-of-day savings bank account balance exceeding ₹1 lakh

controls.control_objective: To ensure vary only on account of one or more of the following reasons: (1) tenor of deposits a bank shall have the freedom to determine the maturity / tenor of
controls.control_description:
In addition to the conditions laid down in paragraph 6 of these Directions, interest
rates on term deposits shall vary only on account of one or more of the following
reasons:
(1) Tenor of deposits
A bank shall have the freedom to determine the maturity / tenor of the deposit
subject to the condition that minimum tenor of the deposit offered shall be seven
days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to vary only on account of one or more of the following reasons: (1) tenor of deposits a bank shall have the freedom to determine the maturity / tenor of

controls.control_objective: To ensure be offered only on bulk deposits
controls.control_description:
(2) Size of deposits
Differential interest rate shall be offered only on bulk deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be offered only on bulk deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable on deposit schemes framed on the basis of the bank term deposit scheme, 2006
controls.control_description:
Provided that differential interest shall not be applicable on deposit schemes framed
on the basis of the Bank Term Deposit Scheme, 2006.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable on deposit schemes framed on the basis of the bank term deposit scheme, 2006

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable on deposits received under the capital gains accounts scheme, 1988 by a bank
controls.control_description:
Provided also that differential interest shall not be applicable on deposits received
under the Capital Gains Accounts Scheme, 1988 by a bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable on deposits received under the capital gains accounts scheme, 1988 by a bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the freedom to offer term deposits without premature withdrawal option
controls.control_description:
(3) Non-availability of premature withdrawal option
<image>
A bank shall have the freedom to offer term deposits without premature withdrawal
option.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the freedom to offer term deposits without premature withdrawal option

controls.control_objective: To ensure have premature withdrawal facility
controls.control_description:
Provided that all term deposits accepted by a bank from individuals (held singly or
jointly) for amount of ₹1 crore and below shall have premature withdrawal facility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have premature withdrawal facility

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as under: (1) interest shall be paid at the rate applicable to the amount and period for which the deposit remained with the bank and not at the co
controls.control_description:
The interest rates applicable on term deposits withdrawn before the maturity
date shall be as under:
(1) Interest shall be paid at the rate applicable to the amount and period for which
the deposit remained with the bank and not at the contracted rate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as under: (1) interest shall be paid at the rate applicable to the amount and period for which the deposit remained with the bank and not at the co

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid
controls.control_description:
(2) No interest shall be paid, where premature withdrawal of deposit takes place
before completion of the minimum period specified in paragraph 9(1).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at its discretion, allow additional interest of one per cent per annum, over and above the rate of interest mentioned in the schedule of interest rates on savings or term deposits to bank's staff and their exclusive associations as well as on deposits of chairman, chairman & managing director, executive director, or such other executives appointed for a fixed tenure
controls.control_description:
A bank shall, at its discretion, allow additional interest of one per cent per
annum, over and above the rate of interest mentioned in the schedule of interest
rates on savings or term deposits to bank's staff and their exclusive associations as
well as on deposits of Chairman, Chairman & Managing Director, Executive Director,
or such other Executives appointed for a fixed tenure, subject to the following
conditions:
(1) The additional interest is payable till the person continues to be eligible for the
same and in case of his ceasing to be so eligible, till the maturity of a term deposit
account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at its discretion, allow additional interest of one per cent per annum, over and above the rate of interest mentioned in the schedule of interest rates on savings or term deposits to bank's staff and their exclusive associations as well as on deposits of chairman, chairman & managing director, executive director, or such other executives appointed for a fixed tenure

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow additional interest in respect of the deposit account opened with it during the period of deputation
controls.control_description:
(3) In the case of employees taken on deputation from another bank, the bank from
which they are deputed may allow additional interest in respect of the deposit
account opened with it during the period of deputation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow additional interest in respect of the deposit account opened with it during the period of deputation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be
controls.control_description:
(4) In the case of persons taken on deputation for a fixed tenure or on a contract of
a fixed tenure, the benefit will cease to accrue on the expiry of the term of deputation
<image>
or contract, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for additional interest
controls.control_description:
(5) Bank Employees' Federations, in which bank employees are not direct
members, shall not be eligible for additional interest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for additional interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid on the compensation awarded by the court to a minor child and deposited in the joint name of minor child and parent as the money belongs to th
controls.control_description:
(6) The additional interest may be paid on the following deposits after obtaining a
declaration from the depositor concerned, that the monies deposited or which may
be deposited from time to time into such account belong to the depositor:
Note: Additional interest admissible to the bank's staff shall not be paid on the
compensation awarded by the court to a minor child and deposited in the joint
name of minor child and parent as the money belongs to the minor child and
not the bank's staff.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid on the compensation awarded by the court to a minor child and deposited in the joint name of minor child and parent as the money belongs to th

controls.control_objective: To ensure the staff member / retired staff member is the principal account holder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the staff member / retired staff member is the principal account holder

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at its discretion, formulate term deposit schemes specifically for resident indian senior citizens, offering higher and fixed rates of interest as c
controls.control_description:
A bank may, at its discretion, formulate term deposit schemes specifically for
resident Indian senior citizens, offering higher and fixed rates of interest as
compared to normal deposits of any size.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at its discretion, formulate term deposit schemes specifically for resident indian senior citizens, offering higher and fixed rates of interest as c

controls.control_objective: To ensure this facility is not offered on the term deposit standing in the name of an huf or the karta of the huf, even if the karta is a resident indian senior
controls.control_description:
Provided that this facility is not offered on the term deposit standing in the name of
an HUF or the Karta of the HUF, even if the Karta is a resident Indian senior citizen.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to this facility is not offered on the term deposit standing in the name of an huf or the karta of the huf, even if the karta is a resident indian senior

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at its discretion, give its resident indian retired staffs, who are senior citizens, the benefit of additional interest rates as admissible to senio
controls.control_description:
A bank may, at its discretion, give its resident Indian retired staffs, who are
senior citizens, the benefit of additional interest rates as admissible to senior citizens
over and above the additional interest payable to them by virtue of their being retired
members of the bank's staff.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at its discretion, give its resident indian retired staffs, who are senior citizens, the benefit of additional interest rates as admissible to senio

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the stipulation contained in the paragraph 6 of these directions
controls.control_description:
The rate of interest to be paid on renewal of overdue term deposits shall be
subject to the stipulation contained in the paragraph 6 of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the stipulation contained in the paragraph 6 of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract rate of interest as applicable to savings account <image> or the contracted rate of interest on the matured td, whichever is lower
controls.control_description:
If a Term Deposit (TD) matures and proceeds are unpaid, the amount left
unclaimed with a bank, shall attract rate of interest as applicable to savings account
<image>
or the contracted rate of interest on the matured TD, whichever is lower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract rate of interest as applicable to savings account <image> or the contracted rate of interest on the matured td, whichever is lower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be linked to a directly observable and transparent market determined external benchmark
controls.control_description:
Floating rate domestic term deposits shall be linked to a directly observable and
transparent market determined external benchmark.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be linked to a directly observable and transparent market determined external benchmark

controls.control_objective: To ensure be credited by a bank at quarterly or shorter intervals
controls.control_description:
Interest on savings deposit shall be credited by a bank at quarterly or shorter
intervals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be credited by a bank at quarterly or shorter intervals

controls.control_objective: To ensure be credited on regular basis, irrespective of the operational status of the account
controls.control_description:
Interest on savings bank accounts, including those frozen by the enforcement
authorities, shall be credited on regular basis, irrespective of the operational status of
the account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be credited on regular basis, irrespective of the operational status of the account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per comprehensive policy on interest rate on deposits and subject to the conditions laid down in paragraph 6 of these directions
controls.control_description:
The rate of interest on matured deposits standing in the name of a deceased
individual depositor or two or more joint depositors, where one of the depositors has
died, shall be as per comprehensive policy on interest rate on deposits and subject
to the conditions laid down in paragraph 6 of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be as per comprehensive policy on interest rate on deposits and subject to the conditions laid down in paragraph 6 of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid
controls.control_description:
Interest, if any, on the minimum credit balance in the composite cash credit
account of a farmer maintained with a bank during the period from the 10th to the
last day of each calendar month shall be paid, subject to the conditions given in
paragraph 6 of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a comprehensive policy on penalties for premature withdrawal of term deposits, including partial premature withdrawal, approved by the board of dir
controls.control_description:
There shall be a comprehensive policy on penalties for premature withdrawal of
term deposits, including partial premature withdrawal, approved by the Board of
Directors or any Committee of the Board to which powers have been delegated.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be a comprehensive policy on penalties for premature withdrawal of term deposits, including partial premature withdrawal, approved by the board of dir

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly brought to the notice of the depositors at the time of acceptance of deposits
controls.control_description:
The components of penalty shall be clearly brought to the notice of the
depositors at the time of acceptance of deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly brought to the notice of the depositors at the time of acceptance of deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied
controls.control_description: If not, no penalty shall be levied.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied if the period and aggregate amount of <image> the deposit do not undergo any change
controls.control_description:
In case of splitting of the amount of term deposit at the request from the
claimant(s) of deceased depositors or joint account holders, no penalty for premature
withdrawal of the term deposit shall be levied if the period and aggregate amount of
<image>
the deposit do not undergo any change.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied if the period and aggregate amount of <image> the deposit do not undergo any change

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied
controls.control_description:
No penalty for premature withdrawal shall be levied, where depositors of the
branch of a bank as mentioned in paragraph 6(9) of these Directions desire
premature withdrawal of deposit consequent to the transfer of business to another
bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accepted only by those banks that are authorised under foreign exchange management act, 1999 (fema) by reserve bank of india from time to time
controls.control_description:
Rupee deposits of non-residents under NRE and NRO deposits shall be
accepted only by those banks that are authorised under Foreign Exchange
Management Act, 1999 (FEMA) by Reserve Bank of India from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accepted only by those banks that are authorised under foreign exchange management act, 1999 (fema) by reserve bank of india from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on the terms and conditions specified in the ensuing paragraphs: (1) the interest rates shall be subject to the conditions laid down in paragraph 6
controls.control_description:
Interest on deposits of money accepted or renewed under NRE / NRO deposit
scheme shall be on the terms and conditions specified in the ensuing paragraphs:
(1) The interest rates shall be subject to the conditions laid down in paragraph 6 of
these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on the terms and conditions specified in the ensuing paragraphs: (1) the interest rates shall be subject to the conditions laid down in paragraph 6

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in accordance with paragraph 8 of these directions
controls.control_description:
(2) Interest rates on savings deposits under NRE Deposits / NRO Deposits shall be
in accordance with paragraph 8 of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in accordance with paragraph 8 of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure vary only on account of one or more of the following reasons:
controls.control_description:
(3) Interest rates on NRE / NRO term deposits shall vary only on account of one or
more of the following reasons:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to vary only on account of one or more of the following reasons:

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the freedom to determine the maturity / tenor of the deposit subject to the condition that minimum tenor of nre term deposits shall be one year a
controls.control_description:
(i) Tenor of deposits
A bank shall have the freedom to determine the maturity / tenor of the deposit
subject to the condition that minimum tenor of NRE term deposits shall be one
year and that of NRO term deposits shall be seven days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the freedom to determine the maturity / tenor of the deposit subject to the condition that minimum tenor of nre term deposits shall be one year a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be offered only on bulk deposits
controls.control_description:
(ii) Size of deposits
Differential interest rate shall be offered only on bulk deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be offered only on bulk deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the freedom to offer nre / nro term deposits without premature withdrawal option
controls.control_description:
(iii) Non-availability of premature withdrawal option
A bank shall have the freedom to offer NRE / NRO term deposits without
premature withdrawal option.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the freedom to offer nre / nro term deposits without premature withdrawal option

controls.control_objective: To ensure have premature withdrawal facility
controls.control_description:
Provided that all NRE / NRO term deposits accepted from individuals (held singly
or jointly) for amount of ₹1 crore and below shall have premature withdrawal
facility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have premature withdrawal facility

controls.control_objective: To ensure be higher than those offered by the bank on comparable domestic rupee term deposits1
controls.control_description:
(4) I nterest rates on NRE / NRO deposits shall not be higher than those offered by
the bank on comparable domestic rupee term deposits1.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be higher than those offered by the bank on comparable domestic rupee term deposits1

controls.control_objective: To ensure qualify for such exemptioni
controls.control_description:
Any transfer from NRO accounts to
<image>
NRE accounts shall not qualify for such exemptioni.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to qualify for such exemptioni

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available to nre and nro deposits
controls.control_description:
(5) The benefit of additional interest rate on deposits on account of being bank's
own staff or senior citizens shall not be available to NRE and NRO deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available to nre and nro deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be credited at quarterly or shorter intervals by a bank
controls.control_description:
(6) Interest on savings deposits shall be credited at quarterly or shorter intervals by
a bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be credited at quarterly or shorter intervals by a bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid as under:
controls.control_description:
(7) If an NRE account holder, immediately on return to India, requests for
conversion of the NRE term deposit into Resident Foreign Currency (RFC) account,
interest shall be paid as under:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid as under:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid at a rate not exceeding the rate payable on savings deposits held in rfc accounts
controls.control_description:
(i) If the NRE deposit has not run for a minimum period of one year, interest shall
be paid at a rate not exceeding the rate payable on savings deposits held in
RFC accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid at a rate not exceeding the rate payable on savings deposits held in rfc accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid at the contracted rate
controls.control_description: (ii) In all other cases, interest shall be paid at the contracted rate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid at the contracted rate

controls.control_objective: To ensure mark any type of lien, direct or indirect, against nre saving deposits
controls.control_description:
A bank shall not mark any type of lien, direct or indirect, against NRE saving
deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mark any type of lien, direct or indirect, against nre saving deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a comprehensive policy on penalties for premature withdrawal of nre term deposits approved by the board of directors or any committee of the board to which powers have been delegated
controls.control_description:
There shall be a comprehensive policy on penalties for premature withdrawal of
NRE term deposits approved by the Board of Directors or any Committee of the
Board to which powers have been delegated, subject to the following:
(1) The components of penalty shall be clearly brought to the notice of the
depositors at the time of acceptance of the deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be a comprehensive policy on penalties for premature withdrawal of nre term deposits approved by the board of directors or any committee of the board to which powers have been delegated

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied for premature withdrawal of nre term deposits for conversion into rfc account
controls.control_description:
(2) No penalty shall be levied for premature withdrawal of NRE term deposits for
conversion into RFC account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied for premature withdrawal of nre term deposits for conversion into rfc account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied for conversion of nre deposit into fcnr(b) deposit and vice versa
controls.control_description:
(3) Penalties for premature withdrawal shall be levied for conversion of NRE deposit
into FCNR(B) deposit and vice versa.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied for conversion of nre deposit into fcnr(b) deposit and vice versa

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied
controls.control_description:
(4) No penalty for premature withdrawal shall be levied, where depositors of the
branch of a bank as mentionned in paragraph 6(9) of these Directions desire
premature withdrawal of deposit consequent to the transfer of business to another
bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as a domestic rupee term deposit and interest shall be paid for the subsequent period at a rate applicable to a domestic term deposit of si
controls.control_description:
In case the claimant(s) of an NRE term deposit account of a deceased depositor
are residents, the deposit on maturity shall be treated as a domestic rupee term
deposit and interest shall be paid for the subsequent period at a rate applicable to a
domestic term deposit of similar maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as a domestic rupee term deposit and interest shall be paid for the subsequent period at a rate applicable to a domestic term deposit of si

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accepted only by those banks that are authorised under foreign exchange management act,1999 (fema) by reserve bank of india from time to time
controls.control_description:
Foreign Currency Deposits under FCNR(B) Scheme shall be accepted only by
those banks that are authorised under Foreign Exchange Management Act,1999
(FEMA) by Reserve Bank of India from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accepted only by those banks that are authorised under foreign exchange management act,1999 (fema) by reserve bank of india from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in accordance with the terms and conditions specified in the ensuing paragraphs: (1) the interest rates shall be subject to the conditions laid dow
controls.control_description:
Interest on deposits of money accepted or renewed under the FCNR(B) Scheme
shall be in accordance with the terms and conditions specified in the ensuing
paragraphs:
(1) The interest rates shall be subject to the conditions laid down in paragraph 6 of
these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in accordance with the terms and conditions specified in the ensuing paragraphs: (1) the interest rates shall be subject to the conditions laid dow

controls.control_objective: To ensure vary only on account of one or more of the following reasons:
controls.control_description:
(2) Interest rates on term deposits under the FCNR(B) Scheme shall vary only on
account of one or more of the following reasons:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to vary only on account of one or more of the following reasons:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as under: a) one year and above but less than two years
controls.control_description:
(i) Tenor of deposits
The maturity period for term deposits under the FCNR(B) Scheme shall be as
under:
a) One year and above but less than two years;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as under: a) one year and above but less than two years

controls.control_objective: To ensure accept or renew fcnr(b) deposits over five years and no recurring deposits shall be accepted under the fcnr(b) scheme
controls.control_description:
Provided that, no bank shall accept or renew FCNR(B) deposits over five years
and no recurring deposits shall be accepted under the FCNR(B) Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to accept or renew fcnr(b) deposits over five years and no recurring deposits shall be accepted under the fcnr(b) scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at its discretion, decide the currency-wise minimum quantum on which differential rates of interest may be offered
controls.control_description:
(ii) Size of deposits
A bank shall, at its discretion, decide the currency-wise minimum quantum on
which differential rates of interest may be offered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at its discretion, decide the currency-wise minimum quantum on which differential rates of interest may be offered

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the overall ceiling prescribed at paragraph 31(7) below
controls.control_description:
<image>
(3) The interest rates on all deposits, including where differential rates of interest are
offered, shall be subject to the overall ceiling prescribed at paragraph 31(7) below.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the overall ceiling prescribed at paragraph 31(7) below

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid within the ceiling of swap rates for the respective currency / maturity and in case of fixed rate deposits, interest shall be paid within the
controls.control_description:
(4) Interest on floating rate deposits shall be paid within the ceiling of swap rates for
the respective currency / maturity and in case of fixed rate deposits, interest shall be
paid within the ceiling of Overnight Alternative Reference Rate (ARR) for the
respective currency / maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid within the ceiling of swap rates for the respective currency / maturity and in case of fixed rate deposits, interest shall be paid within the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be six months for all floating rate deposits
controls.control_description: (5) The interest reset period shall be six months for all floating rate deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be six months for all floating rate deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure form the base for fixing ceiling rates for the interest rates offered effective in the following month
controls.control_description:
(6) The Overnight ARR for the respective currency / SWAP rates as on the last
working day of the preceding month shall form the base for fixing ceiling rates for the
interest rates offered effective in the following month.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to form the base for fixing ceiling rates for the interest rates offered effective in the following month

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as under: period of deposit ceiling rate one year to less than three overnight arr for the respective currency / swap years plus 250 basis points t
controls.control_description:
(7) The interest rates ceiling on FCNR(B) deposits shall be as under:
Period of Deposit Ceiling Rate
One year to less than three
Overnight ARR for the respective currency / Swap
years
plus 250 basis points
Three years and above upto and
Overnight ARR for the respective currency / Swap
plus 3502 basis points
including five years
2 The interest rate ceiling applicable to fresh FCNR(B) deposits mobilised by banks,
including the deposits that are renewed upon maturity, for three years and above-
upto and including five years tenors, is temporarily withdrawn with effect from June
17, 2026, for the period until September 30, 2026ii.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as under: period of deposit ceiling rate one year to less than three overnight arr for the respective currency / swap years plus 250 basis points t

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used as the reference for arriving at the interest rates on fcnr(b) deposits
controls.control_description:
(FBIL) shall be used as the reference for
arriving at the interest rates on FCNR(B) deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used as the reference for arriving at the interest rates on fcnr(b) deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated on the basis of 360 days to a year
controls.control_description:
Interest on the deposits accepted under the Scheme shall be calculated on the
basis of 360 days to a year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated on the basis of 360 days to a year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated and paid at intervals of 180 days each and thereafter for the remaining actual number of days
controls.control_description:
The interest on FCNR (B) deposits shall be calculated and paid at intervals of
180 days each and thereafter for the remaining actual number of days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated and paid at intervals of 180 days each and thereafter for the remaining actual number of days

controls.control_objective: To ensure vest with the depositor
controls.control_description:
Provided that the option to receive the interest on maturity with compounding effect
shall vest with the depositor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to vest with the depositor

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as under: (1) if the period from the date of maturity till the date of renewal (both days inclusive) does not exceed 14 days, the rate of interest
controls.control_description:
Interest calculation on renewal of FCNR(B) deposits shall be as under:
(1) If the period from the date of maturity till the date of renewal (both days inclusive)
does not exceed 14 days, the rate of interest payable on the amount of the deposit
so renewed shall be the appropriate rate of interest for the period of renewal as
prevailing on the date of maturity or on the date when the depositor seeks renewal,
whichever is lower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as under: (1) if the period from the date of maturity till the date of renewal (both days inclusive) does not exceed 14 days, the rate of interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined by treating it as a fresh term deposit
controls.control_description:
(2) In all other cases of renewal, interest rates for the overdue period on the
renewed amount shall be determined by treating it as a fresh term deposit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined by treating it as a fresh term deposit

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at its discretion, recover the interest paid for the overdue period, i
controls.control_description:
(3) If, after renewal, the deposit is withdrawn before completion of the minimum
stipulated period under the Scheme, a bank authorised under FEMA, 1999, may, at
its discretion, recover the interest paid for the overdue period, i.e., period beyond the
original date of maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at its discretion, recover the interest paid for the overdue period, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure pay interest on the term deposits standing in the name(s) of a deceased fcnr(b) individual depositor or two or more joint depositors
controls.control_description:
A bank shall pay interest on the term deposits standing in the name(s) of a
deceased FCNR(B) individual depositor or two or more joint depositors, where one
of the depositors has died, as under:
(1) If paid on the maturity of the deposit, interest shall be paid at the contracted rate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pay interest on the term deposits standing in the name(s) of a deceased fcnr(b) individual depositor or two or more joint depositors

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid not at the contracted rate but at the rate applicable to the period for which the deposit remained with the bank and without charging penalty
controls.control_description:
(2) If the deposit is claimed before the maturity date, interest shall be paid not at the
contracted rate but at the rate applicable to the period for which the deposit
remained with the bank and without charging penalty for pre-payment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid not at the contracted rate but at the rate applicable to the period for which the deposit remained with the bank and without charging penalty

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid at the contracted rate till the date of maturity and simple interest at the applicable rate operative on the date of maturity for the period f
controls.control_description:
(3) In case the depositor dies before the date of maturity of the deposit, but the
amount of the deposit is claimed after the date of maturity, interest shall be paid at
the contracted rate till the date of maturity and simple interest at the applicable rate
operative on the date of maturity for the period for which the deposit remained with
<image>
the bank beyond the date of maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid at the contracted rate till the date of maturity and simple interest at the applicable rate operative on the date of maturity for the period f

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid from the date of maturity till the date of payment
controls.control_description:
(4) In case of death of the depositor after the date of maturity of the deposit, the
interest rate operative on the date of maturity in respect of savings deposit held
under RFC Account Scheme shall be paid from the date of maturity till the date of
payment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid from the date of maturity till the date of payment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be converted into indian rupees on the date of maturity and interest shall be paid for the subsequent period at the rate applicable to a domestic term
controls.control_description:
(5) In case the claimants are residents, the maturity proceeds shall be converted
into Indian Rupees on the date of maturity and interest shall be paid for the
subsequent period at the rate applicable to a domestic term deposit of similar
maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be converted into indian rupees on the date of maturity and interest shall be paid for the subsequent period at the rate applicable to a domestic term

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue
controls.control_description:
A bank may, at its discretion, on receipt of the request from the depositor, allow
FCNR(B) deposits of persons of Indian nationality / origin who return to India for
permanent settlement to continue till maturity at the contracted rate of interest
subject to the conditions that:
(1) The rate of interest as applicable to FCNR(B) deposits shall continue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as resident deposits from the date of return of the account holder to india
controls.control_description:
(2) Such deposits shall be treated as resident deposits from the date of return of the
account holder to India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as resident deposits from the date of return of the account holder to india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be converted into resident rupee deposit account or rfc account (if eligible) at the option of the account holder
controls.control_description:
(3) The FCNR(B) deposits on maturity shall be converted into Resident Rupee
Deposit Account or RFC Account (if eligible) at the option of the account holder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be converted into resident rupee deposit account or rfc account (if eligible) at the option of the account holder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the relevant rate applicable for such deposit account
controls.control_description:
(4) The rate of interest on the new deposit (Rupee account or RFC Account) shall
be the relevant rate applicable for such deposit account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the relevant rate applicable for such deposit account

controls.control_objective: To ensure pay interest at the time of conversion of fcnr(b) account into rfc / resident rupee account even if the deposit has not completed the minimum maturity
controls.control_description:
Subject to the conditions given in paragraph 6 of these Directions, a bank shall
pay interest at the time of conversion of FCNR(B) Account into RFC / Resident
Rupee Account even if the deposit has not completed the minimum maturity period
mentioned in paragraph 31(2)(i) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pay interest at the time of conversion of fcnr(b) account into rfc / resident rupee account even if the deposit has not completed the minimum maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed the rate payable on savings bank deposits held under rfc account scheme
controls.control_description:
Provided that the rate of interest shall not exceed the rate payable on savings bank
deposits held under RFC Account Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed the rate payable on savings bank deposits held under rfc account scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure , on request from the depositor, permit premature withdrawal of deposits under the fcnr(b) scheme
controls.control_description:
A bank shall, on request from the depositor, permit premature withdrawal of
deposits under the FCNR(B) Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , on request from the depositor, permit premature withdrawal of deposits under the fcnr(b) scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid
controls.control_description:
If the premature withdrawal of FCNR(B) deposits takes place before completion
of the minimum stipulated period as mentioned in paragraph 31(2)(i) above, no
interest shall be paid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a comprehensive policy on penalties for premature withdrawal of fcnr(b) term deposits approved by the board of directors or any committee of the board to which powers have been delegated
controls.control_description:
There shall be a comprehensive policy on penalties for premature withdrawal of
FCNR(B) term deposits approved by the Board of Directors or any Committee of the
Board to which powers have been delegated, subject to the following:
(1) The components of penalty shall be clearly brought to the notice of the
depositors at the time of acceptance of the deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be a comprehensive policy on penalties for premature withdrawal of fcnr(b) term deposits approved by the board of directors or any committee of the board to which powers have been delegated

controls.control_objective: To ensure be borne by the bank
controls.control_description:
If not, the exchange loss arising
out of premature withdrawal shall be borne by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be borne by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied on premature withdrawal of fcnr(b) deposits
controls.control_description: (2) Penalty shall be levied on premature withdrawal of FCNR(B) deposits
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied on premature withdrawal of fcnr(b) deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied if the period and aggregate amount of the deposit do not undergo any change
controls.control_description:
(3) In case of splitting of the amount of term deposit at the request from the
claimant(s), no penalty for premature withdrawal of the term deposit shall be levied if
the period and aggregate amount of the deposit do not undergo any change.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied if the period and aggregate amount of the deposit do not undergo any change

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at its discretion, levy penalty to recover the swap cost in the case of premature withdrawal of fcnr(b) deposits
controls.control_description:
(4) A bank shall, at its discretion, levy penalty to recover the swap cost in the case
of premature withdrawal of FCNR(B) deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at its discretion, levy penalty to recover the swap cost in the case of premature withdrawal of fcnr(b) deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied in the case of premature conversion of balances held in fcnr(b) deposits into rfc accounts by non-resident indians on their return to india
controls.control_description:
(5) No penalties shall be levied in the case of premature conversion of balances
held in FCNR(B) deposits into RFC Accounts by Non-Resident Indians on their
return to India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied in the case of premature conversion of balances held in fcnr(b) deposits into rfc accounts by non-resident indians on their return to india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied
controls.control_description:
(6) No penalty for premature withdrawal shall be levied, where depositors of the
branch of a bank as mentioned in paragraph 6(9) of these Directions desire
premature withdrawal of deposit consequent to the transfer of business to another
bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the freedom to determine interest on deposits of money <image> accepted by it or renewed by it under the rfc account scheme, in accordance with t
controls.control_description:
A bank shall have the freedom to determine interest on deposits of money
<image>
accepted by it or renewed by it under the RFC Account Scheme, in accordance with
the comprehensive policy on interest rate on deposits duly approved by the Board of
Directors or any Committee of the Board to which powers have been delegated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the freedom to determine interest on deposits of money <image> accepted by it or renewed by it under the rfc account scheme, in accordance with t

controls.control_objective: To ensure : (1) pay any remuneration or fees or commission or brokerage or incentives on deposits in any form or manner to any individual, firm, company, associ
controls.control_description:
A bank shall not:
(1) Pay any remuneration or fees or commission or brokerage or incentives on
deposits in any form or manner to any individual, firm, company, association,
institution or any other person except:
Explanation For the purposes of this clause, 'political party' means an association or
body of individual citizens of India, which is, or is deemed to be registered with the
Election Commission of India as a political party under the Election Symbols
(Reservation and Allotment) Order, 1968 as in force for the time being.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to : (1) pay any remuneration or fees or commission or brokerage or incentives on deposits in any form or manner to any individual, firm, company, associ

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at a bank's discretion, be given to depositors at the time of accepting deposits
controls.control_description:
However, inexpensive
gifts costing not more than ₹250/- which is the amount prescribed by the Indian
Banks' Association (IBA) as part of the Ground Rules and Code of Ethics framed by
them, may, at a bank's discretion, be given to depositors at the time of accepting
deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at a bank's discretion, be given to depositors at the time of accepting deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be indicated invariably
controls.control_description:
Simple rate of interest
per annum for the period of deposit should be indicated invariably.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be indicated invariably

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to: (1) a deposit received by a bank:
controls.control_description:
The provisions in the above paragraphs shall not be applicable to:
(1) A deposit received by a bank:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to: (1) a deposit received by a bank:

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines repealed
prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in
force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
<image>
respect of any matter covered herein, and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
